locked_tech.comment: Every MUST NOT change, do not modify, and tech stack declaration extracted from all docs files
locked_tech.database: Supabase PostgreSQL via service role client
locked_tech.auth_algorithm: HS256 JWT via crypto.subtle (Web Crypto API)

locked_constraints: Do not refactor surrounding code.
Do not touch surrounding code, do not refactor, do not rename anything
Do not leave a partially-changed file — revert any speculative edits before moving on.
Do not fix it. The `orchestration/` directory will be excluded from TypeScript compilation in Module 3.
Do not batch multiple fixes into a single commit.
Do not add `tsconfig.tsbuildinfo` to `.gitignore` yet
Do not skip ahead and add the env import in this fix — that creates a dependency on Module 4 which is not yet built.
Do not move: `verifyWebhookSignature` (it is already in the lib file).
Do not add `export const runtime = 'edge'` to Node.js-only routes
No new product features may be added during this pipeline
The Supabase schema (`001_initial_schema.sql`) is accepted as ground truth; no schema changes except the `increment_message_count` RPC function
All fixes must preserve existing API contract shapes
`jsonwebtoken` may be removed only after confirming zero remaining imports
No UI changes
No new features
No real network calls [in unit tests]. No real database.
`lib/env.ts` must have zero imports from the project; only `import { z } from 'zod'` is allowed
`lib/supabase/client.ts` (the browser Supabase client) does NOT import `lib/env.ts` — it is a browser-side module and must not import server-only code.
lib/supabase/client.ts must not import lib/env.ts
New product features or UI changes [are explicitly NOT included in this build]
Database migrations (schema is accepted as-is from `001_initial_schema.sql`) [are explicitly NOT included]
Supabase RLS policy redesign [is explicitly NOT included] (RLS policies exist but are bypassed by the service role client; documenting this as a known risk but not rewriting policies)
Stripe product/price ID configuration (IDs stored as env vars, not changed) [is explicitly NOT included]
OpenAI prompt engineering changes [are explicitly NOT included]
`npx tsc --noEmit` must exit 0 after every commit in this module
No API response shapes are changed (requests and responses for all routes remain identical)
This module is strictly read-only. No source files may be modified. No git commits are made. [Module 2]
Do not speculate. Escalate to Module 2 (Codebase Audit). Document the error in the Module 2 audit under Area 1.
Do not use `as string` [for Stripe.Invoice.customer] — this is a real union
Every fix is committed independently before the next fix begins.
After every fix, run `npx tsc --noEmit` before committing to ensure the fix did not introduce a type regression.
Only execute Fix F if grep for 'jsonwebtoken' in lib/ app/ middleware.ts returns zero results
No file in `lib/` or `app/api/` reads `process.env.*` directly (except `lib/env.ts` and `lib/supabase/client.ts`)
`.env.local` must be in `.gitignore`
`.env.example` is committed to the repository
Tests that import files which depend on `lib/env.ts` must either set test env vars in vitest.config.ts or mock lib/env.ts
Flow 1 (signup) is skipped in CI via `SKIP_STRIPE_E2E=true`
E2E tests target the `risedial-test` Supabase project — a separate project created specifically for testing
The Supabase schema (`001_initial_schema.sql`) is accepted as the ground truth; no schema changes except the `increment_message_count` RPC function for atomic rate limiting
`jsonwebtoken` may be removed from `package.json` only after confirming it has zero remaining imports in the codebase
No test makes a real database call, real Stripe API call, or real OpenAI API call. [Unit/Integration tests]
Do not add `export const runtime = 'edge'` to Node.js-only routes
Never use `as string` for Stripe.Invoice.customer
Must use `--noEmit` not build for type checking; `next build` will obscure type errors behind bundler output
Do not read files in `orchestration/` — they will be excluded from tsconfig compilation in Module 3
Silent failure that results in an empty assistant message is not acceptable.
Do not write any other file [other than module-manifest.json — project mapper instruction]
